overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red jacket walking through a neon-lit urban street at night. The character moves along a sidewalk lined with large digital billboards, transitions under a highway overpass, and enters a covered commercial plaza with food stalls and teal neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with large digital advertising billboards under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past illuminated billboards, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large glowing pink digital billboard displaying 'wide open' text with snake graphic
wide concrete stairs leading up to highway overpass level
elevated highway structure casting shadows and blocking sky
tall black lamp post with yellow illuminated bands

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath a highway overpass, passing large glowing digital billboards on the right wall. The prominent pink 'wide open' billboard illuminates the scene with red neon light. A single pedestrian walks ahead in the distance as the camera follows smoothly.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway transitioning to commercial plaza

events.description: entering covered commercial plaza area with food stalls and teal neon lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass, approaching and entering the covered market area with food vendors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in casual clothing walking past the camera character

entered.detail: large blue and red illuminated billboard with 'CIRRUS COLA' text and star logo
small food stall with green neon lighting and service counter
teal-colored vending machine with glowing interface and product display

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper under the overpass where the lighting shifts to mixed neon tones. A large Cirrus Cola billboard hangs ahead while food vendor kiosks with green neon accents line the right side. The environment becomes more enclosed as the character approaches the covered plaza entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial plaza with multiple food stalls and neon signage

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back toward the plaza entrance

agents.ego_description: navigating through the covered plaza, turning around and walking among scattered pedestrians and food stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue dress standing near food stall
pedestrian in camouflage jacket walking through the plaza

entered.detail: green neon sign with 'OPEN' text hanging above stall entrance
multiple food vendor stalls with illuminated displays and service windows
large yellow industrial pipes with valve wheels attached to building wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the covered plaza, teal and green neon lights illuminate food stalls and vending machines. The character turns around and walks back through the space, passing other pedestrians. The pink 'wide open' billboard becomes visible again in the distance as the character approaches the plaza exit, with industrial pipes and concrete stairs now visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban underpass that transitions into a vibrant, enclosed commercial plaza. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a highway overpass, where a prominent pink wide open billboard casts a red glow over the scene. As the character moves deeper under the structure, the lighting shifts to mixed neon tones and the environment becomes more enclosed, passing a Cirrus Cola sign and food kiosks with green accents. The scene then opens into a covered plaza illuminated by teal and green lights among vending machines and food stalls before the character turns around to walk back toward the exit. Finally, the camera retreats past industrial pipes and concrete stairs, bringing the distant pink billboard back into view as the character leaves the plaza.
